signals: ROAS is far below the target of 3
Generic search is spending heavily with weak CTR and high CPA
Landing page signals suggest poor mobile conversion readiness

hypotheses.cause: Generic gift traffic is too broad and low intent
hypotheses.whyLikely: High spend and low efficiency in the generic search campaign suggest weak traffic quality
howToVerify: Split generic gift terms from product-intent terms
Measure CPA and ROAS after narrowing match quality

hypotheses.cause: Landing page is not converting mobile traffic effectively
hypotheses.whyLikely: High bounce rate and short time on page indicate the offer is not landing clearly
howToVerify: Move offer and delivery promise above the fold
Track conversion rate changes by device

optimizationActions.action: Reduce spend on broad generic gift themes and add negatives for low-intent bargain searches
optimizationActions.expectedImpact: Improve traffic quality and lower CPA
howToValidate: Compare search term CPA after 3 to 5 days

optimizationActions.action: Update the landing page so the Mother's Day offer and shipping cutoff appear in the first screen on mobile
optimizationActions.expectedImpact: Increase conversion rate and reduce bounce rate
howToValidate: Measure bounce rate and purchase rate by device
Compare conversion rate before and after page update

optimizationActions.action: Shift more budget toward product-intent and remarketing campaigns once those segments are isolated

summary: Spend is high relative to revenue, with ROAS significantly under target
Generic search is the largest efficiency problem
findings: Traffic quality and landing page readiness are the two biggest constraints
Current bidding and keyword breadth are likely over-expanding low-intent traffic
learnings: Generic seasonal gift traffic needs stronger filtering
Delivery and urgency messaging must be visible above the fold during peak season
